name: Sao Dem Lounge
tagline:
Authentic Vietnamese comfort food on Federal.
Pho, rice plates, and good vibes — all under one roof.
about_title: A Taste of Vietnam on Federal
about_paragraphs: Sao Dem Starry Night Lounge brings the comforting flavors of Vietnam to Denver's Federal Boulevard. Our kitchen serves authentic pho, rice plates, and Vietnamese favorites made the traditional way.
Whether you're craving a steaming bowl of pho on a cold Colorado evening or looking for a casual spot to gather with friends, Sao Dem delivers warmth in every bowl.
Family recipes. Fresh ingredients. A welcoming atmosphere that keeps you coming back.
menu_subtitle: Steaming bowls. Fresh flavors. Vietnamese comfort.

items.name: Combination Pho
items.desc: Beef broth with rare steak, brisket, tendon, tripe

items.name: Rare Steak Pho
items.desc: Beef broth with thin-sliced rare steak

items.name: Broken Rice Plate
items.desc: Grilled pork, egg, and pickled vegetables

items.name: Vermicelli Bowl
items.desc: Rice noodles with grilled meat & fresh herbs

items.name: Spring Rolls (4pc)
items.desc: Fresh shrimp & herb rolls with peanut sauce

items.name: Vietnamese Iced Coffee
items.desc: Strong drip coffee with condensed milk

reviews_list.text: Delicious food, great service, friendly staff!! The pho is exactly what you want on a cold Denver night.
reviews_list.author: Google Reviewer

reviews_list.text: Hidden gem on Federal! The combination pho is loaded with meat and the broth is rich and flavorful. Great value too.
reviews_list.author: Local Regular

reviews_list.text: Cozy atmosphere, authentic Vietnamese food, and the prices are very reasonable. We'll definitely be back.
reviews_list.author: First-time Visitor
